overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character exploring a snowy Japanese temple complex. The character approaches a five-story pagoda, ascends the stone stairs to the wooden platform, passes through a red gate, and explores the outer temple grounds where villagers gather around a campfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy temple approach path through bamboo grove

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily through deep snow toward the five-story pagoda

entered.detail: tall red wooden pagoda with five tiers and snow-covered curved roofs
dense bamboo forest lining the left side of the approach path
traditional Japanese stone lanterns marking the path

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks through a serene winter landscape toward a majestic five-story pagoda. Snow blankets the ground and bamboo groves line the left side of the path, while stone lanterns mark the approach to the temple.

scene_state.functional_zone: pagoda entrance stairs and upper wooden platform

events.description: character reaches stone stairs and begins ascending toward pagoda entrance
character descends stairs on opposite side and approaches red temple gate

agents.ego_description: climbing snow-dusted stone stairs, crossing the red wooden platform, and descending toward the temple gate

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading up to the pagoda entrance
red wooden deck surrounding the pagoda base with snow on railings
large red wooden temple gate with traditional lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs to the pagoda's wooden platform, walking beneath the massive tiered roof structure. After crossing the platform, the character descends the opposite stairs and approaches a large red temple gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple outer grounds with ancient tree and village camp

events.description: passing through red gate into outer temple courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through snowy courtyard toward villagers gathered around a campfire near a large tree

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered around a warming campfire

entered.detail: massive ancient tree with gnarled branches covered in snow
single-story wooden temple structure with curved roof
low stone wall lining the temple courtyard

segments.scene_description: Passing through the red gate, the character enters the outer temple grounds where a massive twisted tree dominates the courtyard. Villagers gather around a campfire near the tree, and auxiliary temple buildings line the right side of the snowy clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene winter landscape that transitions from a solitary approach to a bustling temple courtyard. It begins with the samurai walking along a snow-blanketed path lined with bamboo groves and stone lanterns toward a majestic five-story pagoda. As the character reaches the structure, the camera follows the ascent up stone stairs onto a wooden platform beneath the massive tiered roof before descending the opposite side toward a large red temple gate. Passing through the gate, the scene opens into the outer temple grounds where a massive twisted tree dominates the snowy clearing. The movement finally settles on a gathering of villagers huddled around a campfire, with auxiliary temple buildings lining the edge of the courtyard.
